positive: A stylized geometric celestial map overlaying a mystical woodland scene. The composition features strong, interconnected elements: branching, bioluminescent flora (ferns, mushrooms) intertwine with abstract cosmic elements like crescent moons, constellations, and stardust. The style is neo-vintage botanical meets abstract space art, utilizing clean silhouettes and thick, graphic outlines for high-contrast visibility on fabric. Dominant color palette should be deep indigo, forest emerald, muted gold, and creamy off-white. Central focus is a luminous nexus point where the roots and stars converge. Studio quality, vector illustration aesthetic, perfect for merchandise print, symmetrical composition, high detail, crisp linework, flat graphic design elements, 8k.
negative: photorealistic, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, grunge, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain
